nodes.name: Charles Chubb (ornithologist)
nodes.summary: Charles Chubb (31 December 1851 – 25 June 1924) was a British ornithologist.

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Campina thrush
nodes.summary: Campina thrush（Campina thrush，学名 Turdus arthuri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 杜伊達峰
nodes.summary: 杜伊達峰是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Sapphire-rumped parrotlet、Olive manakin、Chapman's bristle tyrant等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The campina thrush (Turdus arthuri) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also found in many widely scattered locations throughout Amazonian Brazil. The South American Classification Committee has at least one documented record in Bolivia, a location not mentioned in other sources. In Venezuela it is primarily found on Cerro Duida and Cerro Yapacana.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | title =Birds of Venezuela | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =second | date =2003 | location =Princeton NJ | pages =712 | language =English }} In general it inhabits a variety of semi-open to open landscapes including light woodlands, mature secondary forest, disturbed areas, parks, and gardens
